findings.evidence: `FiniteCofree.lean` only defines `cofree` at lines 54-57 and `cofreeMap` at lines 108-146, while the underlying cofree API has `Comodule.Hom.cofreeLift` and `Comodule.Hom.cofreeEquiv` at `Cofree.lean:252` and `Cofree.lean:310`.
findings.fix: Add `FGComoduleCat.cofreeLift` and `FGComoduleCat.cofreeEquiv : (P ⟶ cofree M) ≃ (P →ₗ[R] M)` for finite source objects, with simp lemmas for apply and symm_apply.
findings.issue: `FGComoduleCat.cofree` is named as the finite cofree comodule but has no finite-category `cofreeLift`/`cofreeEquiv` API, so users cannot use the cofree universal property in `FGComoduleCat` without manually dropping to unbundled `Comodule.Hom` and rebundling.

summary: The finite cofree object exposes its carrier, coaction, and coefficient-map functoriality, but it omits the finite-category form of the cofree universal property.
